RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. Hearing held: COUNSEL JAMES DONATO and COURTNEY NGUYEN'S Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel for DEFENDANT AURELIA CHAVEZ is GRANTED upon receipt by the Court of a declaration containing proof that Counsel has sent letters to Defendant Aurelia Chavez, at her last known address, and to her husband at his employer's address advising that counsel will be relieved and that Defendant Chavez will be in propria persona.
